name: Natália Angulo
role: Wedding · Date TBD · 100 guests · Reston VA (OUT-OF-MARKET)

handling.tone: Geographic disambiguation needed — Reston VA is 450+ mi from MA. Bilingual (PT/EN) — Andre opened with mixed Portuguese on Apr 19. Either Brazilian or Spanish-speaking.
handling.voice_adjustments: Andre voice: bilingual-aware, direct. Honest about geography limits. Don't pretend uncertainty — get the location answer first.
handling.context: Inbound Apr 19 from FB Lead Form. 100 guests, no date. Andre sent detailed BALLPARK QUOTE Apr 25 (today): Option 1 Brazilian BBQ ~$2,656.69, Option 2 Deluxe Churrasco ~$3,049.69. BUT zip is 20190 Reston VA — Close score 'within immediate area' is WRONG. Wedding location TBD.

context_anchors: Reston VA 20190 — 450+ miles from MA service zone
Close score 'Within immediate area' is MIS-SCORED
Andre sent detailed ballpark quote Apr 25 (today)
'Angulo' Spanish surname; 'Natália' with Portuguese accent leans Brazilian

lead.source: FB Lead Form — VIDEO RODS WEDDING & FACELESS
lead.next_move: Wait 48-72h for response; if no reply by Apr 29, send geography-clarification message

enrichment.identity_notes: Natália with accent + Angulo surname = Hispanic/Latin American background. Angulo common Spanish-origin; Natália with Portuguese accent leans Brazilian. Bilingual phrasing Andre used ('Te liguei agorinha, Vc ta precisando de Catering?') was Portuguese.
win_angles: Resolve geographic question FIRST — don't let it drift
Bilingual warmth — match language she responds in
Don't dismiss out-of-market — she may be planning destination MA wedding
Ballpark quote already went today — wait for response
nepq_openers: PT: 'Olá Natália — vi que seu CEP é 20190 Reston, Virginia. Quero confirmar uma coisa importante: o casamento vai ser em Massachusetts ou em Virginia? Isso muda completamente o que conseguimos fazer pra você.'
EN: 'Hi Natália — noticed your zip is 20190 Reston, Virginia. Critical question: is the wedding in Massachusetts or Virginia? Changes everything about what's feasible.'
Frame: 'How did you find Comeketo all the way from Virginia — family in MA, planning here for a reason?'
open_gaps: WHERE is the wedding — primary blocker
Why she came to Comeketo from VA
enrichment.strategic_note: 'Within immediate area' Close score is misleading — 450-mi-away lead. Andre may not have noticed. ONE bilingual clarification asking location directly. If wedding in MA, real deal. If VA, refer to Virginia caterer. Current state — sending detailed quotes without geographic clarity — is process leak to patch in intake.

comms.summary: Bilingual opener 'Te liguei agorinha, Vc ta precisando?' + service overview
Detailed BALLPARK quote: Option 1 Brazilian BBQ $2,657, Option 2 Deluxe $3,050

notes: Out-of-market — geography is the existential question
